name: op_move
description: ZOMBIE-OP PROOF (move): `move` was declared with no match arm — it answered `ok` and the window never moved. It now sets FullWindowState.position = WindowPosition::Initialized(x, y) through CallbackChange::ModifyWindowState, the same channel a platform ConfigureNotify / WM_MOVE lands on: apply_user_change() saves previous_window_state, applies the position and runs the state-diff pass, which emits WindowMove (event_determination.rs) and — on a real platform — sync_window_state() pushes the position to the OS window. This test reads the LIVE position back: a vacuous `ok` leaves it Uninitialized and assert_window_state fails with 'window position is not initialized'.

css: html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
